title: poa juncifolia var. ampla
intro: Poa juncifolia var. ampla, also known as the large-flowered meadow-grass or bigflower meadow-grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa juncifolia var. ampla include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and some herbal practitioners also use it in combination with other herbs for its medicinal properties.
